mapper.select: SELECT * FROM style_images WHERE is_active = true ORDER BY RAND() LIMIT #{limit}
SELECT si.*, sit.style_tag_id, st.name, st.category FROM style_images si LEFT JOIN style_image_tags sit ON si.id = sit.image_id LEFT JOIN style_tags st ON sit.style_tag_id = st.id WHERE si.id = #{id}
SELECT DISTINCT style_category FROM style_images WHERE is_active = true AND style_category IS NOT NULL AND style_category != '' ORDER BY style_category ASC
